name: DNS Exfiltration Tools Execution Detected
description: Detects the execution of known tools used for DNS exfiltration, such as iodine.exe and dnscat2. Adversaries may use these tools to create covert communication channels and exfiltrate data over the DNS protocol.

prompts.prompt: Execution of a known DNS exfiltration tool detected. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **User** {user}, **Process Name** {process_name}, **Parent Process Name** {parent_process_name}, **Command** {command}. Investigate this critical event to determine if data exfiltration or covert command and control communication is occurring.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for Process Creation (e.g., 1).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process ran.

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the DNS exfiltration tool process (e.g., iodine.exe, dnscat2).

parameters.name: parent_process_name
parameters.description: The parent process that launched the DNS exfiltration tool.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute the tool.
